scope_summary.problem: E2E tests are scattered (e2e/ for grid, examples/mini-react/ for jet build) with no dev server coverage. Recent features (HMR, React Fast Refresh, TS stripping, PostCSS) have zero automated E2E tests.
scope_summary.success_criteria: Unified e2e/ directory with Playwright projects isolating build vs dev scenarios. All major jet features have at least one E2E test.

boundary.in_scope: File moves (e2e/grid/, e2e/jet/), Playwright config expansion (vite-build, jet-build, jet-dev), new test files (dev-server, hmr, css)
boundary.out_of_scope: examples/jet/ and examples/react-bench/ stay unchanged, no Rust unit test changes
boundary.constraints: All tests share the existing mini-react TodoMVC app as fixture
